title: Onboarding - Navigating through onboarding screens
scenario: User can navigate through onboarding screens (Organized, Up-to-Date, Personal) by swiping left/right or tapping Continue button
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Observe the onboarding flow that appears on first launch (or after clearing app data).
3. On the first onboarding screen titled "Organized", attempt to swipe left to navigate to the next screen.
4. Alternatively, tap the "Continue" button to progress.
5. On the second onboarding screen titled "Up-to-Date", swipe left or tap "Continue" to move forward.
6. On the third onboarding screen titled "Personal", swipe left or tap "Continue" to proceed.
7. Attempt to swipe right on any screen to navigate back to the previous onboarding screen.
expected: User can smoothly scroll left and right through all three onboarding screens ("Organized", "Up-to-Date", "Personal") by swiping left/right or tapping the "Continue" button. Navigation is responsive and screens transition correctly in both directions.
